title: The Computer Virus
content: One day, my computer started behaving strangely. Programs opened slowly, and unexpected messages appeared on the screen. I realized that the computer might have a virus. I immediately ran an antivirus scan. The software found several harmful files and removed them. After restarting the computer, everything worked much better. Since then, I have been more careful when downloading files and opening email attachments. I also keep my antivirus program updated. Taking these precautions helps protect my computer and personal information from potential threats.
